name: Envoy
description: Envoy is a high-performance, open-source proxy and communication bus designed for cloud-native applications. It serves as a sidecar proxy in service mesh architectures, handling load balancing, traffic routing, observability, and security at the network edge.
advantages: Rich observability with metrics, logging, and tracing
L7 routing with support for HTTP/2 and gRPC
disadvantages: Significant memory footprint in large deployments
Steep learning curve for advanced features
Can be overkill for simpler architectures
